metadata.description: ESC Guideline Validation Dataset - ALL Topics with 4+ RCTs (2012-2026) - ESC Methodology Working Group Compliant
metadata.coverage: 57 ESC guideline topics spanning 16 therapeutic areas
enhancements_v5: Safety outcomes for all Class I topics

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Vaduganathan M, et al. Lancet 2022;400:757-767
Lechat P, et al. Circulation 1998;98:1184-1191
Garg R, Yusuf S. JAMA 1995;273:1450-1456
Burnett H, et al. BMC Cardiovasc Disord 2017;17:35
Wang Y, et al. ESC Heart Failure 2020;7:3142-3151
Cleland JGF, et al. Eur Heart J 2013;34:3547-3556
Komajda M, et al. Int J Cardiol 2017;236:190-196
Graham FJ, et al. Eur J Heart Fail 2023;25:528-537

validated_topics.name: ICD for Primary Prevention of SCD

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Stavrakis S, et al. Eur Heart J 2017;38:1738-1746

validated_topics.name: Digoxin in Heart Failure

reference_meta_analysis.citation: DIG Trial. NEJM 1997;336:525-533

validated_topics.note: No mortality benefit but 28% reduction in HF hospitalization

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Armstrong PW, et al. NEJM 2020;382:1883-1893
Ruff CT, et al. Lancet 2014;383:955-962

safety_outcomes.note: Higher with dabigatran 150mg, rivaroxaban, edoxaban 60mg; similar with apixaban

validated_topics.name: Catheter Ablation vs Drugs in AF

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Turagam MK, et al. Circulation 2021;143:1377-1390
Holmes DR, et al. J Am Coll Cardiol 2017;70:2964-2975

validated_topics.name: Lenient vs Strict Rate Control in AF

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Van Gelder IC, et al. NEJM 2010;362:1363-1373

validated_topics.note: Lenient rate control (<110 bpm) non-inferior to strict (<80 bpm)

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Nidorf SM, et al. NEJM 2020;383:1838-1847

safety_outcomes.note: Signal from LoDoCo2, not confirmed in COLCOT

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Capodanno D, et al. JACC 2021;78:1145-1156

validated_topics.name: DAPT De-escalation After ACS

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Greco A, et al. Circ Cardiovasc Interv 2023;16:e013242

validated_topics.note: De-escalation after 1-3 months reduces bleeding without increased ischemia

validated_topics.name: Primary PCI vs Fibrinolysis in STEMI

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Keeley EC, et al. Lancet 2003;361:13-20
Bates ER, et al. JAHA 2020;9:e015263

validated_topics.name: Radial vs Femoral Access for PCI

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Karrowni W, et al. Am J Cardiol 2021;143:21-30
Zimmermann FM, et al. Eur Heart J 2019;40:180-186

validated_topics.name: Drug-Eluting vs Bare Metal Stents

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Palmerini T, et al. Lancet 2015;385:2145-2154

validated_topics.note: DES reduce TVR; newer-gen EES safest; similar mortality

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Hong SJ, et al. JACC 2024;83:623-634

validated_topics.name: CABG vs PCI for Left Main/Multivessel

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Ahmad Y, et al. Eur Heart J 2020;41:3228-3235

validated_topics.note: No mortality difference; CABG favored for MACE due to lower repeat revascularization

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Taylor RS, et al. Eur Heart J 2023;44:452-469

validated_topics.name: Beta-Blockers Post-MI (Preserved EF)

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Zeitouni M, et al. Eur Heart J 2024;45:ehae666

pooled_effect.outcome: All-cause death or MI or HF

validated_topics.note: No benefit in patients with EF ≥50%

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Zeitouni M, et al. Eur Heart J 2024;45:ehae666 (subgroup)
Sattar N, et al. Lancet Diabetes Endocrinol 2021;9:653-662

safety_outcomes.note: SUSTAIN-6 signal, not confirmed in other trials
Theoretical risk from rodent studies; not confirmed in humans; contraindicated in MEN2/MTC

validated_topics.name: SGLT2i in Diabetes for CV Prevention

reference_meta_analysis.citation: McGuire DK, et al. JAMA Cardiol 2021;6:148-158

safety_outcomes.note: CANVAS signal; not seen with other SGLT2i

reference_meta_analysis.citation: CTT Collaboration. Lancet 2010;376:1670-1681

pooled_effect.outcome: Major vascular events per 1mmol/L LDL-C reduction

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Guedeney P, et al. Eur Heart J 2019;40:607-617

safety_outcomes.note: No significant increase despite very low LDL-C

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Cochrane Database Syst Rev 2018;CD012502

validated_topics.name: Omega-3 Fatty Acids (EPA) for CV Prevention

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Hu Y, et al. Front Nutr 2022;9:809311

validated_topics.note: EPA monotherapy (REDUCE-IT) shows benefit; EPA+DHA (STRENGTH) did not

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Nissen SE, et al. NEJM 2023;388:1353-1364

validated_topics.name: DOACs for VTE Treatment

reference_meta_analysis.citation: van Es N, et al. Blood 2014;124:1968-1975

validated_topics.note: 39% reduction in major bleeding vs VKA (RR 0.61)

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Ettehad D, et al. Lancet 2016;387:957-967
Azizi M, et al. Lancet 2021;397:2476-2486

safety_outcomes.note: No significant change in eGFR at 36 months

validated_topics.name: TAVI vs SAVR for Aortic Stenosis

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Siontis GCM, et al. Eur Heart J 2023;44:836-844

validated_topics.name: MitraClip for Secondary Mitral Regurgitation

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Abraham J, et al. JACC 2024;84:1826-1836

validated_topics.note: Benefit in proportionate MR phenotype (EROA >0.3cm2, LVEDV <195mL)

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Imazio M, et al. J Am Coll Cardiol 2013;62:1491-1498

validated_topics.name: Mavacamten for Obstructive HCM

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Olivotto I, et al. Lancet 2020;396:759-769

validated_topics.note: Mean LVOT gradient reduction -57.3 mmHg; 90% patients avoid septal reduction

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Brown TJ, et al. Cochrane Database Syst Rev 2021;CD003748

safety_outcomes.note: Black box warning due to PDE3 inhibition

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Lane R, et al. Cochrane Database Syst Rev 2017;CD000990

validated_topics.name: CEA vs CAS for Carotid Stenosis

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Bonati LH, et al. Lancet Neurol 2021;20:853-862

validated_topics.note: Similar long-term outcomes; CAS has higher periprocedural stroke but lower MI

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Lajoie AC, et al. Lancet Respir Med 2016;4:291-305

validated_topics.name: Aspirin for Primary CV Prevention

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Zheng SL, et al. JAMA 2019;321:277-287

validated_topics.note: Not recommended in primary prevention; bleeding offsets benefit

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Cahill K, et al. Cochrane Database Syst Rev 2016;CD009329

validated_topics.name: Triple vs Dual Antithrombotic Therapy (AF + ACS/PCI)

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Lopes RD, et al. Lancet 2019;394:1749-1757

validated_topics.note: Dual therapy (DOAC + P2Y12i) preferred over triple therapy

validated_topics.name: Mechanical Circulatory Support in Cardiogenic Shock

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Thiele H, et al. NEJM 2012;367:1287-1296 (IABP-SHOCK II)

validated_topics.note: IABP not recommended routinely; Impella shows benefit in DanGer Shock

validated_topics.name: P2Y12 Inhibitor Comparison (NMA Topic)

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Navarese EP, et al. BMJ 2021;374:n1079

validated_topics.note: NMA shows prasugrel most efficacious but highest bleeding; ticagrelor balanced

validated_topics.name: DOAC Comparison in AF (NMA Topic)

reference_meta_analysis.citation: Lopez-Lopez JA, et al. BMJ 2017;359:j5058

validated_topics.note: NMA: Apixaban best overall balance; dabigatran 150 most efficacious; GI bleeding varies
